title: Upload new features from the repository via Github/Gitlab actions?
excerpt:
I’m curios is there an option to upload my source code to extensions via Github/Gitlab actions? 
Looking for information about that.

posts.author: mpsujek (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m curios is there an option to upload my source code to extensions via Github/Gitlab actions?
Looking for information about that.

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mpsujek,

Could you share more on what you’re looking to do?

Are you looking to upload source code for a monday app? source code as a file on a monday board?

posts.author: mpsujek (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml: The first scenario, I’m looking for an option to upload my source code for a monday app. Like upload from GitHub or GitLab

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for clarifying @mpsujek!

Currently there’s no option to upload from Github/Gitlab – The only way to upload source code is to create a build.
